# Documentation

This directory contains additional documentation for the Terraform modules in this repository.

## Contents

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| *(none yet)* | Documentation will be added here as modules are developed. |

## Auto-generated Docs

Module documentation is auto-generated from the Terraform source using [`terraform-docs`](https://terraform-docs.io/) via the [`terraform_docs`](https://github.com/antonbabenko/pre-commit-terraform?tab=readme-ov-file#terraform_docs) pre-commit hook. Each module's `README.md` contains a `<!-- BEGINNING OF PRE-COMMIT-TERRAFORM DOCS HOOK -->` / `<!-- END OF PRE-COMMIT-TERRAFORM DOCS HOOK -->` block that is updated automatically on commit.
